hero.imageLine: Where botanical wisdom meets modern skin science.
hero.description: Every formulation begins with deep research into skin biology and ingredient science. Because
hero.descriptionAccent: what touches your skin should understand it first.

philosophy.label: Why HEDONE
philosophy.description: We only use 100% natural and vegan ingredients — because we genuinely believe in nature's healing power. Every product is a result of deep science, careful sourcing, and rigorous testing.
philosophy.itiText: All products tested in partnership with
philosophy.pillar0Summary: Science-first formulation rooted in skin biology.
philosophy.pillar0Point0: In-depth study of each ingredient's natural chemistry
philosophy.pillar0Point1: Skin biology analysed across body zones & types
philosophy.pillar0Point2: Curated selection for safe, visible, balanced results
philosophy.pillar1Point0: Finest ingredients from Sri Lanka, UK, USA, Canada & Australia
philosophy.pillar1Point1: Multiple trials to achieve ideal texture & skin feel

products.label: The Collection
products.description: Face, body, and therapy — each crafted to work in harmony with your skin. Tap any product to explore the full story.
products.bottomText: Want the full story on ingredients & benefits?
products.brochureMessage: Hi, I'd like to know more about HEDONE products
products.enquireMessage: Hi, I'd like to know more about
products.item0Tagline: Your acne-prone skin's new best friend.
products.item0Point0: Balances excess sebum with non-greasy jojoba & grapeseed oils
products.item0Point1: Calms active breakouts with soothing lavender essential oil
products.item0Point2: Fades post-acne marks & evens skin tone with ylang ylang
products.item0Point3: MCT oil drives nutrients deep into the skin barrier
products.item0Point4: Transforms your night routine into a calming sleep ritual
products.item0Description: This satin-like oil naturally balances excessive sebum production without adding extra grease. Lavender essential oil works overtime to inhibit breakouts while healing wounded pimples — no irritation, just clear-skin satisfaction. Ylang ylang diminishes the appearance of scars while jojoba oil repairs damage with its vitamin-rich formula. The non-greasy grapeseed oil naturally balances sebum production while MCT oil drives nutrients deep where they're needed most.
products.item0Directions: At night before bed, wash and dry your face. Take two small drops and place one on each cheek, plus a smaller amount on your forehead. Gently massage using circular motions until fully absorbed. Apply on both face and neck. For best results, use every night.
products.item1Tagline: Your daily reset button for city-stressed skin.
products.item1Point0: Shields skin from pollution with antioxidant-rich vanilla & spinach
products.item1Point1: Deep long-lasting hydration with shea butter & aloe vera
products.item1Point2: Fights free radicals & premature aging with vitamins C, E, A & K
products.item1Point3: Soothes redness, burns & rashes with turmeric essential oil
products.item1Point4: Designed for modern city living — your daily skin reset
products.item1Description: City life isn't exactly a spa day for the skin. This powerhouse formula works to deeply hydrate, brighten, and refine the complexion while combating environmental stressors. The antioxidants in vanilla essential oil and spinach extract's rich complex of vitamins fight free radicals, combat premature aging, and rejuvenate the skin. Rich shea butter moisturizes while pomegranate seed oil kickstarts your skin's collagen production. The dynamic duo of aloe vera and turmeric handles everything from everyday hydration to healing minor skin concerns.
products.item1Directions: Apply all over your body after bathing and drying off. For dark patches, massage thoroughly on those spots. For best results, use daily. If your skin feels irritated after shaving, dab some on those areas to calm the burning sensation.
products.item2Tagline: Your new best friend for dry, chapped skin.
products.item2Point0: Relieves dry, chapped winter skin with shea & green tea butter
products.item2Point1: Creates a breathable moisture barrier that locks in hydration
products.item2Point2: Improves skin clarity & reduces discoloration over time
products.item2Point3: Jasmine, patchouli & geranium balance oil production
products.item2Point4: Rich moisture without heaviness — skin breathes freely
products.item2Description: Packed with skin superfood shea butter and luxurious green tea butter, they deeply moisturize dry, chapped areas while creating a breathable protective barrier that locks in hydration. This thoughtfully crafted formula helps reduce discoloration and blemishes while enhancing skin clarity. Unlike heavy conventional balms, this 100% natural and vegan creation allows your skin to breathe while still providing serious moisture. Aromatic jasmine, patchouli, and geranium essential oils balance oil production, boost collagen, and even lift your mood on dreary winter days.
products.item2Directions: After your bath, dry your skin then apply the balm all over your body. Works best at night. For cracked feet or chapped skin, apply on those spots every night. During winter, feel free to use anytime throughout the day.
products.item3Point0: Silky, lightweight oil that reveals your natural radiance
products.item3Point1: Fades dark spots, scars & blemishes for even-toned skin
products.item3Point2: Frangipani, orange & ylang ylang smooth rough patches
products.item3Point3: Omega fatty acids & vitamin E lock in long-lasting moisture
products.item3Point4: Soothes irritation from sweat, sun & daily pollution
products.item3Description: It's silky, light, and transforms dull, uneven skin into something noticeably smoother and more radiant. This 100% natural and vegan body oil goes deep to nourish while improving tone, texture, and clarity — without leaving you feeling greasy. The aromatic blend of frangipani, orange, and ylang ylang smooth out rough patches, help fade dark spots, scars, and blemishes. Packed with omega fatty acids and natural vitamin E that keep skin moisturized for hours while still letting it breathe. Think of it as more than just a body oil — it's your daily self-care routine.
products.item3Directions: Apply after your nighttime bath when skin is dry. Rub all over your body with a good massage, focusing extra on dark patches, blemishes, or bumpy areas. For best results, make it part of your daily routine.
products.item4Tagline: Healthier hair and a happier you, from root to tip.
products.item4Point0: Relieves headaches with cooling peppermint essential oil
products.item4Point1: Calming lavender reduces stress & quiets the senses
products.item4Point2: Castor & argan oils strengthen hair from root to tip
products.item4Point3: Fights dandruff while creating a relaxing scalp experience
products.item4Point4: Turn your head massage into a feel-good mood-lifting ritual
products.item4Description: When your head feels like a pressure cooker, reach for Bonne Humeur. This magical hair and scalp oil does double duty — it's a mood-fixing elixir that relieves headaches and eases stress with its aromatic blend of peppermint and lavender. The moment you apply it, peppermint cools your scalp while lavender creates a sensory cocoon, simultaneously fighting dandruff. The nourishing castor and argan oil blend penetrates deep, moisturizing and strengthening each strand while restoring shine that stress stole away.
products.item4Directions: Pour directly on your head for a refreshing kick. Give your head and scalp a firm but gentle massage for about an hour. Rinse with warm water. Use twice a week for softer, fluffier hair without dandruff.
products.item5Tagline: Your ticket to total body pacification.
products.item5Point0: Full-body massage oil for deep relaxation & muscle relief
products.item5Point1: Lemongrass eases aching muscles & melts built-up tension
products.item5Point3: Neem seed, MCT & sunflower oils leave skin silky-smooth
products.item5Point4: Transforms your routine into a spa-like botanical ritual
products.item5Description: This aromatic blend combines powerful lemongrass to pacify aching muscles, melting tension away, and soothing bergamot for stress relief and physical relaxation. The natural harmony of frankincense and lavender essential oils doesn't just smell divine; it escorts your racing thoughts to a peaceful place where worries dissolve. Meanwhile, the nourishing trio of neem seed, MCT, and sunflower oils pampers your skin, leaving it silky-smooth. Simply warm a few drops between your palms and glide across your body — feel tension dissolve as the botanical scents fill the air.
products.item5Directions: Take a good amount of oil and rub all over your body. Give it about an hour to work its magic. Don't leave it on too long without washing off. For specific trouble spots like sore muscles or tired feet, focus on massaging those areas.
products.item6Tagline: Your ticket to tranquility on cold evenings.
products.item6Point0: Warming cinnamon & clove bud melt muscle tension & stiffness
products.item6Point1: Soothes sore muscles & supports post-workout recovery
products.item6Point2: Sweet almond & neem seed oils deeply nourish the skin
products.item6Point3: Supports skin renewal & healthy cell function
products.item6Point4: Perfect comfort for cold evenings & tired limbs
products.item6Description: When winter chills or workday stress settle into your muscles, this natural blend goes to work with warming cinnamon and clove bud essential oils that melt tension away. These powerful botanicals dig deep into achy muscles and joints, melting tension like tropical sunshine. This luxurious formula doesn't stop at relaxation — it supports healthy cell division while sweet almond and neem seed oils nourish and moisturize your skin. Perfect for cold evenings or post-workout recovery when your muscles are crying for relief.
products.item6Directions: Take a good amount of oil and rub all over your body. Give it about an hour for the aromatherapy to work. For specific trouble spots like sore muscles, achy joints, or tired feet, focus on massaging those areas for targeted relief.
products.item7Tagline: The gift of 'me time' for your body.
products.item7Point0: Luxurious massage balm that relieves tension & nourishes skin
products.item7Point1: Mango & green tea butters boost elasticity & smooth aging
products.item7Point2: Rosehip & rice bran oils reduce fine lines & wrinkles
products.item7Point3: Warming cinnamon leaf enhances circulation to tight muscles
products.item7Point4: Patchouli & rose calm your skin and quiet your mind
products.item7Description: This 100% vegan formula works double-duty — not just relieving your tensed and sore muscles, but moisturizing and nourishing the skin with every application. A dream team of mango and green tea butter boosts skin elasticity and evens out aging skin. The powerful blend of rosehip and rice bran oil helps reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. Meanwhile, cinnamon leaf essential oil handles circulation duty, sending relief to places you didn't even know were tight. The aromatic blend of patchouli and rose calms both your skin and your mind.
products.item7Directions: Massage into warm skin. Breathe deeply and let your body unwind. Focus on areas with muscle tension for targeted relief. For best results, make it a regular part of your self-care routine.

journey.label: Our Journey
journey.description: Every HEDONE product carries a story of meticulous care — from the first spark of an idea to the final safety certification. Here is how we get there.
journey.milestone0Description: HEDONE was born from a simple conviction — that truly effective skincare doesn't need harsh chemicals. It needs science, patience, and respect for what nature already provides.
journey.milestone1Description: Months of studying scientific literature on every ingredient. Understanding how skin varies across different body areas, tones, and types. Curating formulations that are safe, visible, and balanced.
journey.milestone2Title: From Sri Lanka to the world
journey.milestone2Description: The finest natural ingredients sourced from trusted suppliers across Sri Lanka, the UK, USA, Canada, and Australia. Because great skincare knows no borders.
journey.milestone3Description: Multiple development rounds to achieve the ideal texture and feel. Natural butters and plant-based waxes refined into breathable, nourishing formulations that support the skin's natural rhythm.
journey.milestone4Description: Rigorous volunteer testing across diverse skin types. Full compliance with Ecocert, COSMOS, and IFRA standards. Every product lab-tested at the Industrial Technology Institute of Sri Lanka.
journey.quote: Synthetic products may offer quick results — but prolonged use can lead to side effects. With HEDONE, every ingredient is plant-derived and chosen to work in harmony with your skin. That is our promise.

footer.brandDesc: 100% natural and vegan skincare crafted in Sri Lanka. Extensively researched, quality assured, and thoroughly tested.
footer.copyright: HEDONE Natural Skincare. All rights reserved.
